entry.title: Asia Amputee in Everyday Life: Lovely amputee lady on high heel Confidently

link.title: Asia Amputee in Everyday Life: Lovely amputee lady on high heel Confidently

entry.content:
"Asia Amputee in Everyday Life" explored how persons with amputee perceived the experience of disability in their everyday lives. In this video series, disability was described as a multifaceted, complex experience that is integrated into the lives of persons with disabilities, how well they were able to integrate disability into their lives. Have you ever seen a disabled singer, model, artist or just a normal girl with a disability ? Now you see :)
Follow my channel for daily amazing video !!!
entry.summary: "Asia Amputee in Everyday Life" explored how persons with amputee perceived the experience of disability in their everyday lives. In this video series, disability was described as a multifaceted, complex experience that is integrated into the lives of persons with disabilities, how well they were able to integrate disability into their lives. Have you ever seen a disabled singer, model, artist or just a normal girl with a disability ? Now you see :) Follow my channel for daily amazing video !!!

entry.title: ADMU’s Doll House, As Explained By 3 Of Its Members

link.title: ADMU’s Doll House, As Explained By 3 Of Its Members

entry.content: Dollhouse, a community of ADMU students, explains that they are not a college organization. Rather, they are a tight-knit family composed of members of the LGBTQ+ community as well as allies to the cause that hopes to give its members a sense of belongingness and a safe space to freely express who they are and who they want to be. One member shares, “they are the people I can really call ‘my home.’” Learn more about Dollhouse from three of its members.
entry.summary: Dollhouse, a community of ADMU students, explains that they are not a college organization. Rather, they are a tight-knit family composed of members of the LGBTQ+ community as well as allies to the cause that hopes to give its members a sense of belongingness and a safe space to freely express who they are and who they want to be. One member shares, “they are the people I can really call ‘my home.’” Learn more about Dollhouse from three of its members.

entry.title: Manipur Water Project : PM Modi बोले - Corona संकट में देश रुका नहीं, थका नहीं वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Manipur Water Project : PM Modi बोले - Corona संकट में देश रुका नहीं, थका नहीं वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
PM Narendra Modi on Thursday laid the foundation of the virtual Manipur water supply project. The PM said in his address that today’s program is an example of how the country has not stopped, the country has not stopped even in this crisis of Corona. Until the vaccine arrives, where we have to fight vigorously against the corona, the development works also have to be carried forward with full force.
पीएम नरेंद्र मोदी ने गुरुवार को वर्चुअली मणीपुर वाटर सप्लाई प्रोजेक्ट की नींव रखी. पीएम ने अपने संबोधन में कहा कि आज का ये कार्यक्रम, इस बात का उदाहरण है कि कोरोना के इस संकट काल में भी देश रुका नहीं है, देश थमा नहीं है। जब तक वैक्सीन नहीं आती, जहां कोरोना के खिलाफ हमें मजबूती से लड़ते रहना है वहीं विकास के कार्यों को भी पूरी ताकत से आगे बढ़ाना है।
#ManipurWaterProject #PMModi #oneindiahindi
entry.summary: PM Narendra Modi on Thursday laid the foundation of the virtual Manipur water supply project. The PM said in his address that today’s program is an example of how the country has not stopped, the country has not stopped even in this crisis of Corona. Until the vaccine arrives, where we have to fight vigorously against the corona, the development works also have to be carried forward with full force. पीएम नरेंद्र मोदी ने गुरुवार को वर्चुअली मणीपुर वाटर सप्लाई प्रोजेक्ट की नींव रखी. पीएम ने अपने संबोधन में कहा कि आज का ये कार्यक्रम, इस बात का उदाहरण है कि कोरोना के इस संकट काल में भी देश रुका नहीं है, देश थमा नहीं है। जब तक वैक्सीन नहीं आती, जहां कोरोना के खिलाफ हमें मजबूती से लड़ते रहना है वहीं विकास के कार्यों को भी पूरी ताकत से आगे बढ़ाना है। #ManipurWaterProject #PMModi #oneindiahindi

entry.title: GUCCI EPILOGUE

link.title: GUCCI EPILOGUE

entry.content: Gucci and Alessandro Michele just presented the EPILOGUE collection through special live streaming and the launch of a Visual Narrative Function during the last day of the first Milan Digital Fashion Week.
entry.summary: Gucci and Alessandro Michele just presented the EPILOGUE collection through special live streaming and the launch of a Visual Narrative Function during the last day of the first Milan Digital Fashion Week.

entry.title: Al Gore: RS Interview Special Edition

link.title: Al Gore: RS Interview Special Edition

entry.content: Jamil Smith spoke with former Vice President Al Gore about his organization The Climate Reality Project, the passing of John Lewis, Joe Biden’s climate plan, environmental justice, and Black Lives Matter.
entry.summary: Jamil Smith spoke with former Vice President Al Gore about his organization The Climate Reality Project, the passing of John Lewis, Joe Biden’s climate plan, environmental justice, and Black Lives Matter.

entry.title: Plan de relance européen : Macron salue « un sommet historique »

link.title: Plan de relance européen : Macron salue « un sommet historique »

entry.content: Après quatre jours et quatre nuits de sommet, les dirigeants européens sont parvenus à se mettre d’accord sur un plan de relance de 750 milliards d’euros. Ce plan sera financé pour la première fois par une dette commune destinée à relancer l’économie européenne mise à terre par l’épidémie de Covid-19. L’émission d’une dette commune proposée par le couple franco-allemand a suscité une farouche opposition de la part des pays dits « frugaux », les Pays-Bas, l’Autriche, le Danemark, la Suède et la Finlande, opposés au montant de la dette commune.
entry.summary: Après quatre jours et quatre nuits de sommet, les dirigeants européens sont parvenus à se mettre d’accord sur un plan de relance de 750 milliards d’euros. Ce plan sera financé pour la première fois par une dette commune destinée à relancer l’économie européenne mise à terre par l’épidémie de Covid-19. L’émission d’une dette commune proposée par le couple franco-allemand a suscité une farouche opposition de la part des pays dits « frugaux », les Pays-Bas, l’Autriche, le Danemark, la Suède et la Finlande, opposés au montant de la dette commune.

entry.title: Hallan restos prehispánicos en un oculto cerro de Puebla

link.title: Hallan restos prehispánicos en un oculto cerro de Puebla

entry.content: Habitantes en el municipio de Axutla, Puebla, descubrieron en el Cerro de la Peña, un centro ceremonial con decenas de glifos, estructuras y piezas prehispánicas que datan del año 500 después de Cristo.
entry.summary: Habitantes en el municipio de Axutla, Puebla, descubrieron en el Cerro de la Peña, un centro ceremonial con decenas de glifos, estructuras y piezas prehispánicas que datan del año 500 después de Cristo.

entry.title: [CH] Garaje hinchable para proteger tu coche o moto

link.title: [CH] Garaje hinchable para proteger tu coche o moto

entry.content: ShowCase de CarCapsule es un garaje hinchable que protege cualquier vehículo del polvo, oxidación, moho, humedad, huellas, etc. Se puede instalar en cualquier lugar.
entry.summary: ShowCase de CarCapsule es un garaje hinchable que protege cualquier vehículo del polvo, oxidación, moho, humedad, huellas, etc. Se puede instalar en cualquier lugar.

entry.title: फोन टैपिंग मामले में घिरी राजस्थान सरकार, गृहमंत्रालय ने तलब की रिपोर्ट

link.title: फोन टैपिंग मामले में घिरी राजस्थान सरकार, गृहमंत्रालय ने तलब की रिपोर्ट

entry.content:
राजस्थान फोन टेपिंग मामले में एक नया मोड़ सामने आ गया है. केंद्रीय गृह मंत्रालय ने फोन टेपिंग मामले में राज्य के प्रमुख सचिव से रिपोर्ट तलब की है.  इस मामले में गृह मंत्रालय ने राजस्थान के प्रमुख सचिव से रिपोर्ट मांगी है. इसे भारतीय जनता पार्टी (BJP) ने प्राइवेसी का हनन बताया था.
#HomeMinistry #BJP #RajasthanPoliticalCrisis
entry.summary: राजस्थान फोन टेपिंग मामले में एक नया मोड़ सामने आ गया है. केंद्रीय गृह मंत्रालय ने फोन टेपिंग मामले में राज्य के प्रमुख सचिव से रिपोर्ट तलब की है. इस मामले में गृह मंत्रालय ने राजस्थान के प्रमुख सचिव से रिपोर्ट मांगी है. इसे भारतीय जनता पार्टी (BJP) ने प्राइवेसी का हनन बताया था. #HomeMinistry #BJP #RajasthanPoliticalCrisis

entry.title: Covid-19: des dépistages organisés à Paris Plage

link.title: Covid-19: des dépistages organisés à Paris Plage

entry.content: Des dépistages du Covid-19 sont organisés à Paris Plage jusqu’au 30 août. Le centre installé réalise des tests TROT, où il suffit d’une goutte de sang pour avoir un résultat en quinze minutes. Ces tests sont gratuits et accessibles à tous.
entry.summary: Des dépistages du Covid-19 sont organisés à Paris Plage jusqu’au 30 août. Le centre installé réalise des tests TROT, où il suffit d’une goutte de sang pour avoir un résultat en quinze minutes. Ces tests sont gratuits et accessibles à tous.

entry.title: కోర్టు ని అడ్డుపెట్టుకుని TDP ప్రభుత్వ కార్యక్రమాల్ని అడ్డుకుంటుంది - YS Jagan Oneindia Telugu

link.title: కోర్టు ని అడ్డుపెట్టుకుని TDP ప్రభుత్వ కార్యక్రమాల్ని అడ్డుకుంటుంది - YS Jagan Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
andhra pradesh chief minister ys jagan made sensational comments on opposition tdp once again. jagan says that tdp allegedly restricting govt programmes through courts.
#ysjagan
#ysjaganmohanreddy
#TDP
#Ysrcp
#highcourt
#andhrapradesh
#supremecourt
#chandrababunaidu
#vijayawada
#VanaMahotsavam
#Amaravati
రాష్ట్రంలో వైసీపీ ప్రభుత్వం తొలగించిన ఎన్నికల కమిషనర్ నిమ్మగడ్డ రమేష్ కుమార్ ను తిరిగి అదే పదవిలో నియమించాలని హైకోర్టు, సుప్రీంకోర్టులో టీడీపీ నేతలు పిటిషన్లు వేశారు. చివరికి హైకోర్టు ఆదేశాలతో గవర్నర్ ఇవాళ నిమ్మగడ్డను తిరిగి నియమించాలని ప్రభుత్వానికి సూచించారు.
entry.summary: andhra pradesh chief minister ys jagan made sensational comments on opposition tdp once again. jagan says that tdp allegedly restricting govt programmes through courts. #ysjagan #ysjaganmohanreddy #TDP #Ysrcp #highcourt #andhrapradesh #supremecourt #chandrababunaidu #vijayawada #VanaMahotsavam #Amaravati రాష్ట్రంలో వైసీపీ ప్రభుత్వం తొలగించిన ఎన్నికల కమిషనర్ నిమ్మగడ్డ రమేష్ కుమార్ ను తిరిగి అదే పదవిలో నియమించాలని హైకోర్టు, సుప్రీంకోర్టులో టీడీపీ నేతలు పిటిషన్లు వేశారు. చివరికి హైకోర్టు ఆదేశాలతో గవర్నర్ ఇవాళ నిమ్మగడ్డను తిరిగి నియమించాలని ప్రభుత్వానికి సూచించారు.

entry.title: [Simply K-Pop] TOO(티오오) - Step By Step _ Ep.424

link.title: [Simply K-Pop] TOO(티오오) - Step By Step _ Ep.424

entry.content:
TOO ‘Step By Step’
Heading towards a greater goal, TOO unveiled their 2nd mini-album “Running TOOgether”. “Step By Step” is a funky disco number that brings up memories of a fun summer festival by the beach.
TOO ‘Step By Step’
괴물 신인 TOO가 더 큰 목표를 향한 힘찬 시작을 담아낸 두 번째 미니 앨범 ‘Running TOOgether’을 발매했다. 서브곡 Step By Step은 TOO 멤버들이 직접 작사에 참여한 펑키한 디스코 넘버로, 여름 바다의 흥겨운 축제 분위기를 떠올리게 하는 가사가 돋보이는 곡이다.
entry.summary: TOO ‘Step By Step’ Heading towards a greater goal, TOO unveiled their 2nd mini-album “Running TOOgether”. “Step By Step” is a funky disco number that brings up memories of a fun summer festival by the beach. TOO ‘Step By Step’ 괴물 신인 TOO가 더 큰 목표를 향한 힘찬 시작을 담아낸 두 번째 미니 앨범 ‘Running TOOgether’을 발매했다. 서브곡 Step By Step은 TOO 멤버들이 직접 작사에 참여한 펑키한 디스코 넘버로, 여름 바다의 흥겨운 축제 분위기를 떠올리게 하는 가사가 돋보이는 곡이다.

entry.title: 10 000 places supplémentaires dans l’Enseignement supérieur pour faire face à l’afflux de bacheliers

link.title: 10 000 places supplémentaires dans l’Enseignement supérieur pour faire face à l’afflux de bacheliers

entry.content: La ministre de l'Enseignement supérieur Frédérique Vidal a annoncé ce mardi 21 juillet l'ouverture de 10 000 places supplémentaires dès la rentrée dans les filières les plus demandées de l'enseignement supérieur, pour faire face à l'afflux de lycéens cette année après un taux record de réussite au bac.
entry.summary: La ministre de l&#39;Enseignement supérieur Frédérique Vidal a annoncé ce mardi 21 juillet l&#39;ouverture de 10 000 places supplémentaires dès la rentrée dans les filières les plus demandées de l&#39;enseignement supérieur, pour faire face à l&#39;afflux de lycéens cette année après un taux record de réussite au bac.

entry.title: PUBG MOBILE Gameplay

link.title: PUBG MOBILE Gameplay

entry.content:
PlayerUnknown’s Battlegrounds (PUBG) is an online multiplayer battle royale game developed and published by PUBG Corporation, a subsidiary of South Korean video game company Bluehole. The game is based on previous mods that were created by Brendan "PlayerUnknown" Greene for other games, inspired by the 2000 Japanese film Battle Royale, and expanded into a standalone game under Greene’s creative direction. In the game, up to one hundred players parachute onto an island and scavenge for weapons and equipment to kill others while avoiding getting killed themselves. The available safe area of the game’s map decreases in size over time, directing surviving players into tighter areas to force encounters. The last player or team standing wins the round.
Battlegrounds was first released for Microsoft Windows via Steam’s early access beta program in March 2017, with a full release in December 2017. The game was also released by Microsoft Studios for the Xbox One via its Xbox Game Preview program that same month, and officially released in September 2018. A free-to-play mobile version for Android and iOS was released in 2018, in addition to a port for the PlayStation 4. A version for the Stadia streaming platform was released in April 2020. Battlegrounds is one of the best-selling and most-played video games of all time. The game had sold over 70 million copies by 2020, with PUBG Mobile having been downloaded over 600 million times.
Battlegrounds received positive reviews from critics, who found that while the game had some technical flaws, it presented new types of gameplay that could be easily approached by players of any skill level and was highly replayable. The game was attributed to popularizing the battle royale genre, with a number of unofficial Chinese clones also being produced following its success. The game also received several Game of the Year nominations, among other accolades. PUBG Corporation has run several small tournaments and introduced in-game tools to help with broadcasting the game to spectators, as they wish for it to become a popular esport. The game has also been banned in some countries for allegedly being harmful and addictive to younger players.
entry.summary: PlayerUnknown’s Battlegrounds (PUBG) is an online multiplayer battle royale game developed and published by PUBG Corporation, a subsidiary of South Korean video game company Bluehole. The game is based on previous mods that were created by Brendan "PlayerUnknown" Greene for other games, inspired by the 2000 Japanese film Battle Royale, and expanded into a standalone game under Greene’s creative direction. In the game, up to one hundred players parachute onto an island and scavenge for weapons and equipment to kill others while avoiding getting killed themselves. The available safe area of the game’s map decreases in size over time, directing surviving players into tighter areas to force encounters. The last player or team standing wins the round. Battlegrounds was first released for Microsoft Windows via Steam’s early access beta program in March 2017, with a full release in December 2017. The game was also released by Microsoft Studios for the Xbox One via its Xbox Game Preview program that same month, and officially released in September 2018. A free-to-play mobile version for Android and iOS was released in 2018, in addition to a port for the PlayStation 4. A version for the Stadia streaming platform was released in April 2020. Battlegrounds is one of the best-selling and most-played video games of all time. The game had sold over 70 million copies by 2020, with PUBG Mobile having been downloaded over 600 million times. Battlegrounds received positive reviews from critics, who found that while the game had some technical flaws, it presented new types of gameplay that could be easily approached by players of any skill level and was highly replayable. The game was attributed to popularizing the battle royale genre, with a number of unofficial Chinese clones also being produced following its success. The game also received several Game of the Year nominations, among other accolades. PUBG Corporation has run several small tournaments and introduced in-game tools to help with broadcasting the game to spectators, as they wish for it to become a popular esport. The game has also been banned in some countries for allegedly being harmful and addictive to younger players.

entry.title: Energie : ces voitures du futur qui rouleront à l’hydrogène

link.title: Energie : ces voitures du futur qui rouleront à l’hydrogène

entry.content:
Dans plusieurs pays, dont la France, la production d’hydrogène se développe et nous sommes désormais capables de produire un hydrogène "vert" qui n’est plus produit à partir du gaz naturel, ressource fossile trop polluante. Une fois transformée en électricité grâce à une pile à combustible, cette ressource va alimenter une batterie pour faire rouler n’importe quel type de véhicule. Dans cet épisode de "Avant Demain", Ombline Roche, vous explique pourquoi ce carburant étonnant pourrait être l’énergie du futur.
Aujourd’hui, quand on parle de carburant "vert", tous les regards se tournent vers l’hydrogène. En juin, l’Allemagne a décidé de dépenser 9 milliard d’euros dans la filière. En France, via le plan de relance, le gouvernement a annoncé vouloir investir massivement dans la recherche et la production. Mais comment cela fonctionne-t-il ? Quel est le véritable potentiel de cette énergie ? Et en quoi l’hydrogène "vert" peut-il être un levier incontournable de la transition écologique ?
Dans cet épisode de "Avant Demain", le podcast d’Europe 1 Studio en partenariat avec EDF, Ombline Roche donne la parole à Christelle Rouille, directrice générale d’Hynamics, la filiale d’EDF qui propose une offre d’hydrogène. Elle explique pourquoi cette énergie a des atouts pour devenir celle du futur sur les routes mais aussi sur les rails et même pour le transport maritime.
"Avant Demain" est une production Europe 1 Studio réalisée en partenariat avec EDF. Tous les mois, découvrez deux épisodes pour mieux plongez avec Anicet Mbida et Ombline Roche au coeur des mutations qui sont déjà en train de façonner nos vies.
entry.summary: Dans plusieurs pays, dont la France, la production d’hydrogène se développe et nous sommes désormais capables de produire un hydrogène "vert" qui n’est plus produit à partir du gaz naturel, ressource fossile trop polluante. Une fois transformée en électricité grâce à une pile à combustible, cette ressource va alimenter une batterie pour faire rouler n’importe quel type de véhicule. Dans cet épisode de "Avant Demain", Ombline Roche, vous explique pourquoi ce carburant étonnant pourrait être l’énergie du futur. Aujourd’hui, quand on parle de carburant "vert", tous les regards se tournent vers l’hydrogène. En juin, l’Allemagne a décidé de dépenser 9 milliard d’euros dans la filière. En France, via le plan de relance, le gouvernement a annoncé vouloir investir massivement dans la recherche et la production. Mais comment cela fonctionne-t-il ? Quel est le véritable potentiel de cette énergie ? Et en quoi l’hydrogène "vert" peut-il être un levier incontournable de la transition écologique ? Dans cet épisode de "Avant Demain", le podcast d’Europe 1 Studio en partenariat avec EDF, Ombline Roche donne la parole à Christelle Rouille, directrice générale d’Hynamics, la filiale d’EDF qui propose une offre d’hydrogène. Elle explique pourquoi cette énergie a des atouts pour devenir celle du futur sur les routes mais aussi sur les rails et même pour le transport maritime. "Avant Demain" est une production Europe 1 Studio réalisée en partenariat avec EDF. Tous les mois, découvrez deux épisodes pour mieux plongez avec Anicet Mbida et Ombline Roche au coeur des mutations qui sont déjà en train de façonner nos vies.

entry.title: Police : la note sur les codes vestimentaires passe mal

link.title: Police : la note sur les codes vestimentaires passe mal

entry.content:
La préfecture de Paris rappelle aux policiers les codes vestimentaires à respecter dans l’exercice de leurs fonctions. Quelques considérations sur la barbe pour les hommes. Mais ce sont surtout les policières qui sont visées : coupe de cheveux, maquillage, collants. Un rappel à l’ordre qui agace les fonctionnaires.
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: La préfecture de Paris rappelle aux policiers les codes vestimentaires à respecter dans l’exercice de leurs fonctions. Quelques considérations sur la barbe pour les hommes. Mais ce sont surtout les policières qui sont visées : coupe de cheveux, maquillage, collants. Un rappel à l’ordre qui agace les fonctionnaires. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: Detik-detik Pria Nyaris Tertimpa Longsor di Cianjur

link.title: Detik-detik Pria Nyaris Tertimpa Longsor di Cianjur

entry.content: VIVA –  Seorang pengendara motor nyaris tertimbun longsor dari tebing setinggi 100 meter di Sukanagara, Cianjur, Jawa Barat. Insiden ini terjadi pada 9 April 2020, tapi baru viral di media sosial baru-baru ini.
entry.summary: VIVA – Seorang pengendara motor nyaris tertimbun longsor dari tebing setinggi 100 meter di Sukanagara, Cianjur, Jawa Barat. Insiden ini terjadi pada 9 April 2020, tapi baru viral di media sosial baru-baru ini.

entry.title: Sourav Ganguly In Home Quarantine After His Brother Tests Covid-19 Positive Oneindia Telugu

link.title: Sourav Ganguly In Home Quarantine After His Brother Tests Covid-19 Positive Oneindia Telugu

entry.content:
Sourav Ganguly has home quarantined after older brother Snehasish tested positive for Covid-19 late on Wednesday.
#SouravGanguly
#SnehasishGanguly
#Covid19
#BCCI
#Coronavirus
#homequarantine
భారత క్రికెట్ నియంత్రణ మండలి (బీసీసీఐ) ప్రెసిడెంట్ సౌరవ్ గంగూలీ హోమ్ క్వారంటైన్‌లోకి వెళ్లాడు. అతని సోదరుడు స్నేహాశీష్‌ గంగూలీకి తాజాగా కరోనా సోకడంతో దాదాతో పాటు అతని కుటుంబ సభ్యులు కూడా స్వీయ నిర్భంధంలోకి వెళ్లారు.
entry.summary: Sourav Ganguly has home quarantined after older brother Snehasish tested positive for Covid-19 late on Wednesday. #SouravGanguly #SnehasishGanguly #Covid19 #BCCI #Coronavirus #homequarantine భారత క్రికెట్ నియంత్రణ మండలి (బీసీసీఐ) ప్రెసిడెంట్ సౌరవ్ గంగూలీ హోమ్ క్వారంటైన్‌లోకి వెళ్లాడు. అతని సోదరుడు స్నేహాశీష్‌ గంగూలీకి తాజాగా కరోనా సోకడంతో దాదాతో పాటు అతని కుటుంబ సభ్యులు కూడా స్వీయ నిర్భంధంలోకి వెళ్లారు.

entry.title: India Border-ல் சீண்டும் China மீது New Trade Rules-ஐ விதித்த India Oneindia Tamil

link.title: India Border-ல் சீண்டும் China மீது New Trade Rules-ஐ விதித்த India Oneindia Tamil

entry.content:
தேசிய பாதுகாப்பு அடிப்படையில் எல்லைகளை பகிர்ந்து கொள்ளும் நாடுகளின் வர்த்தகர்களுக்கு இந்தியா புதிய கட்டுப்பாடுகளை விதித்துள்ளது. மத்திய அரசு இதற்காக புதிய வர்த்தக விதிகளை கொணடு வந்துள்ளது. இந்தியாவின் இந்த நடவடிக்கை சீன நிறுவனங்களை கடுமையாக பாதிக்கும் என கூறப்படுகிறது.
India has put restrictions on traders from nations sharing border on grounds of defence and national security. The move is expected to affect Chinese firms
#IndiaChinaBorder
#IndiaChinaBorderFight
#IndiaIdeasSummit
entry.summary: தேசிய பாதுகாப்பு அடிப்படையில் எல்லைகளை பகிர்ந்து கொள்ளும் நாடுகளின் வர்த்தகர்களுக்கு இந்தியா புதிய கட்டுப்பாடுகளை விதித்துள்ளது. மத்திய அரசு இதற்காக புதிய வர்த்தக விதிகளை கொணடு வந்துள்ளது. இந்தியாவின் இந்த நடவடிக்கை சீன நிறுவனங்களை கடுமையாக பாதிக்கும் என கூறப்படுகிறது. India has put restrictions on traders from nations sharing border on grounds of defence and national security. The move is expected to affect Chinese firms #IndiaChinaBorder #IndiaChinaBorderFight #IndiaIdeasSummit
